figures.caption: Figure 2: Task coverage of existing IAD approaches. Only IAD-Unify covers all three tasks under a unified protocol. △ = related but different evaluation protocol.

Figure 8: Qualitative generation comparison. Given a clean source image and a defect mask, IAD-Unify synthesizes realistic defects while preserving background fidelity, whereas SD2 Inpainting produces artifacts or alters unmasked regions.
Figure 7: Qualitative segmentation comparison. Our categoryagnostic expert produces precise masks closely matching ground truth, while per-category specialists yield diffuse anomaly maps.

Figure 3: Architecture of IAD-Unify. Qwen3.5 VLM provides global understanding; a frozen DINOv2 region expert provides anomaly localization. Region tokens are injected via placeholder replacement into the shared backbone.
